economic_hypothesis.null: the frozen relative FINRA off-exchange short-sale transaction-flow state does not improve net weekly SPY/QQQ rotation over the frozen comparators
economic_hypothesis.alternative: relatively greater QQQ short-sale transaction flow identifies relatively greater technology-ETF dealer facilitation and hedging associated with customer risk demand; otherwise SPY is preferred
economic_hypothesis.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal is formed only from official FINRA Consolidated NMS Daily Short Sale Volume rows for SPY and QQQ and is distinct from closed price-volume, CFTC positioning, margin-debit, option-sentiment and implied-volatility lineages
economic_hypothesis.proxy_limitation: FINRA states the files contain publicly disseminated off-exchange transaction volume, are not short interest, are not consolidated with exchange data and may include temporary market-making shorts; this noisy relative intermediation-flow interpretation is frozen and cannot be repaired after outcomes

signal.source: FINRA official Consolidated NMS Daily Short Sale Volume files for SPY and QQQ
signal.decision_time: 09:00 America/New_York on the first accepted XNYS session of each week
signal.latest_allowed_observation: the latest five accepted XNYS sessions strictly before the decision; each daily file is stated by FINRA to be posted no later than 18:00 ET on its trade date
signal.current_measure: for each ETF, sum(ShortVolume+ShortExemptVolume)/sum(TotalVolume) over exactly those five sessions
signal.target_rule: QQQ ratio strictly above SPY ratio selects QQQ at weight 1.0; otherwise selects SPY at weight 1.0
signal.missing_rule: missing file/session/symbol row, duplicate symbol row, nonfinite or negative field, nonpositive aggregate TotalVolume or date mismatch invalidates the interval; no interpolation, alternate source, exchange-volume supplementation, source blend, confirmation, threshold grid or parameter repair

execution.entry: next accepted XNYS open after the preceding accepted signal session; the frozen 09:00 decision must precede that open
execution.holding: until the following weekly accepted execution open
execution.decision_price_basis: previous accepted-session raw close, known before the 09:00 decision
execution.corporate_actions: accepted SPY and QQQ cash distributions and split identities are processed by the shared portfolio core

comparator.primary: weekly rebalanced 50/50 SPY/QQQ target notional under identical cost, whole-share, cash, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action rules
comparator.secondary: weekly rebalanced SPY-only under identical rules

validation_gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY-only
arithmetic mean paired active return versus the 50/50 comparator strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
holdout_gates: all four validation-form gates evaluated on the holdout
centered-null one-sided paired bootstrap p-value at most 0.05
uncentered type-7 5% bootstrap lower bound on mean active return strictly positive

inference.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over weekly active returns versus the 50/50 comparator
inference.limitation: the prospectively frozen four-week block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of statistical sufficiency

stop_rules.validation_failure: permanently close the lineage without holdout access
stop_rules.validation_pass: unlock exactly one retrospective holdout execution
stop_rules.forbidden: no tuning, rerun, threshold or window change, alternate source, source blending, new comparator, changed holding period or post-outcome repair
